introSection: Trolls Trollercoaster, previously known as Woody Woodpecker's Nuthouse Coaster, is a Vekoma roller coaster currently located at Universal Studios Florida in Orlando, Florida, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Woody Woodpecker's Nuthouse Coaster opened on March 13, 1999. The ride was originally themed to look like a fuel-powered train built by Woody himself.

On November 1, 2022, Universal Studios announced that the coaster would close along with most of the Woody Woodpecker's KidZone themed area on January 15, 2023. The ride was repainted and announced to reopen in 2024, now named Trolls TrollerCoaster, as part of the new DreamWorks Land. DreamWorks Land opened in June 2024.

sections.title: Fate
sections.content: One of the original Nuthouse Coaster trains was sent to Lakeland Antique Mall in Lakeland, Florida in May 2025, where each ride car was listed for sale.

fullText:
Trolls Trollercoaster, previously known as Woody Woodpecker's Nuthouse Coaster, is a Vekoma roller coaster currently located at Universal Studios Florida in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Woody Woodpecker's Nuthouse Coaster opened on March 13, 1999. The ride was originally themed to look like a fuel-powered train built by Woody himself.

On November 1, 2022, Universal Studios announced that the coaster would close along with most of the Woody Woodpecker's KidZone themed area on January 15, 2023. The ride was repainted and announced to reopen in 2024, now named Trolls TrollerCoaster, as part of the new DreamWorks Land. DreamWorks Land opened in June 2024.

One of the original Nuthouse Coaster trains was sent to Lakeland Antique Mall in Lakeland, Florida in May 2025, where each ride car was listed for sale.



Red track and blue supports.
